keys.pageDescription: Lihat status sandaran automatik, dasar pengekalan, dan titik pemulihan untuk organisasi anda.
keys.loadError: Tidak dapat memuat status sandaran. Sila cuba lagi.
keys.maintenanceError: Status sandaran tidak tersedia buat sementara. Pasukan kami telah dimaklumkan — cuba lagi atau hubungi Sokongan.
keys.forbiddenError: Anda tidak mempunyai akses kepada status sandaran organisasi ini.
keys.noOrganizations: Tiada organisasi yang dipautkan ke akaun anda.
keys.rpoStatusHint_ok: Your latest backup meets the RPO target for your plan.
keys.rpoStatusHint_catch_up: A backup is overdue but Autopilot is scheduling a catch-up run.
keys.rpoStatusHint_breach: Backups are significantly overdue. Contact Support if this persists.
keys.byoBannerBody: Your organization uses Enterprise BYO hosting. Database and infrastructure backups are your responsibility. Vouus platform backups do not apply to your ERP VM.
keys.policyByoNote: Reference policy for Vouus Managed hosting. Your BYO environment is not covered by platform backups.
keys.layerALabelDetail: Database and weekly site files — all plans
keys.layerBEnabled: Included on your plan (monthly, up to 2 retained)
keys.layerBDisabled: Available on Business and Enterprise plans
keys.upsellLayerBTitle: Need faster recovery and VM snapshots?
keys.upsellLayerBBody: Business and Enterprise plans include Layer B VM snapshots and shorter recovery time objectives (RTO).
keys.recoveryPointsEmpty: No verified recovery points yet. Autopilot will create the first backup soon.
keys.howItWorksLayers_0_body: Frappe bench backup exports your database (and weekly site files) to encrypted cloud storage. Runs automatically on an Autopilot schedule.
keys.howItWorksLayers_1_body: Business and Enterprise plans also receive full VM snapshots for faster recovery when the server itself fails.
keys.howItWorksLayers_2_body: Platform golden images help rebuild VMs. They do not replace your ERP data — Layer A and B protect your tenant data.
keys.recoveryGuideIntro: Restore operations are performed by Vouus Support to protect your data. When you need recovery, contact Support with your organization and the recovery point timestamp from the table above.
keys.recoveryScenarios_0_body: Support can restore from a Layer A recovery point to the current or a new VM.
keys.recoveryScenarios_1_body: Support uses Restore to New VM — Layer B snapshot when available, otherwise Layer A plus a fresh VM.
keys.recoveryScenarios_2_body: Support can restore an older verified recovery point to a clean VM. Report the incident promptly.
keys.securityBullets_0: Backup artifacts are stored in tenant-isolated cloud storage — not downloadable from this portal.
keys.securityBullets_1: Manifest checksums verify backup integrity; optional HMAC signing on platform side.
keys.securityBullets_2: Expired backups are purged automatically per your plan retention period.
keys.securityBullets_3: Restore requests are audited; subdomain confirmation prevents mistaken restores.
keys.securityBullets_4: The platform periodically verifies restore readiness (DiRT sampling).
keys.contactSupportHint: Include your organization name and desired recovery point when requesting restore.
